items.title: Kalshi World Cup 2026: How to trade on 2026 World Cup
items.summary: You can use Kalshi prediction markets to trade event contracts during the 2026 World Cup in the United States, Canada and Mexico, including the match between Norway and England.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Livingstone, Stanley keep Yorkshire waiting on Blast qualification

items.title: England's Guehi, Rice & James all train before Norway game
items.summary: Midfielder Declan Rice and defenders Marc Guehi and Reece James all train with England on the eve of Saturday's World Cup quarter-final against Norway.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
